topic: Every curtain on my street closes at the same exact second at dusk.
title: Every Curtain on My Street Closes at Once | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every curtain on my street closed at the same exact second each dusk.
scenes.image_prompt: A row of suburban houses at dusk with darkened windows, fading orange sky, long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I moved to this quiet block in early spring.
scenes.image_prompt: A peaceful tree lined residential street in soft evening light, dim glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I noticed it on my evening walks.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty sidewalk along a row of houses at twilight, streetlight haze, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At the same moment, every window went dark together.
scenes.image_prompt: A street of houses with curtains drawn across every window at once, dusk, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
A wristwatch held up against a darkening street of houses, fading light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each night, the same minute. Never a second apart.
scenes.image_prompt: Identical darkened front windows along a quiet street at twilight, fog, dim glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I knocked on a neighbor's door to ask why.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand at a dim front door under a porch light, deep shadow, twilight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They said the curtains close on their own. They never touch them.
scenes.image_prompt: A drawn curtain seen from outside a dim lit window at night, soft glow, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So I left mine open one night and watched the street.
scenes.image_prompt: A view from inside a dark room through an open window onto a dim street, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At dusk my curtains pulled shut by themselves, and the street faced my window.
scenes.image_prompt: A closed curtain backlit by streetlight with faint shadows of houses beyond, night, dim glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now I close mine early, before the others can.
scenes.image_prompt: A drawn curtain in a dim room with fading evening light at its edges, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The houses across the street have no people. Only the curtains move.
scenes.image_prompt: A row of dark empty houses at night with curtains drawn, no lights inside, fog, vertical 9:16 framing
